return(function(D,F,X,A,j,y,V,K,k,H,I,p,d,G,s,n,J,l,S,R)s,S,G,H,p,I,n,l,R,K,J,k,d=function(D)local N,n=-366636+366637,D[-426296+426297]while n do K[n],N=K[n]-(550544+-550543),(326010+-326009)+N if end,function(D,N)local F=J(N)local X=function(X,A,j,y,V)return n(D,{X;A;j,y,V},N,F)end return X end,function(n,X,A,j)local Hj={}local
